## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/Build

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test` succeeds
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated relevant docs
